components.name: jackson-annotations
components.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

components.name: jackson-core
components.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

components.name: jackson-databind
components.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

components.name: jackson-datatype-jdk8
components.description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support JDK 8 data types.

components.name: jackson-datatype-jsr310
components.description: Add-on module to support JSR-310 (Java 8 Date & Time API) data types.

components.name: jackson-module-parameter-names
components.description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support introspection of method/constructor parameter names, without having to add explicit property name annotation.

components.name: jackson-bom
components.description: Bill of Materials pom for getting full, complete set of compatible versions of Jackson components maintained by FasterXML.com

components.name: micrometer-core
components.description: Core module of Micrometer containing instrumentation API and implementation

components.name: commons-lang3
components.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

components.name: log4j-api
components.description: The logging API of the Log4j project. Library and application code can log through this API. It contains a simple built-in implementation (`SimpleLogger`) for trivial use cases. Production applications are recommended to use Log4j API in combination with a fully-fledged implementation, such as Log4j Core.

components.name: log4j-to-slf4j
components.description: Forwards the Log4j API calls to SLF4J. (Refer to the `log4j-slf4j[2]-impl` artifacts for forwarding SLF4J to the Log4j API.)

components.name: HdrHistogram
components.description: HdrHistogram supports the recording and analyzing sampled data value counts across a configurable integer value range with configurable value precision within the range. Value precision is expressed as the number of significant digits in the value recording, and provides control over value quantization behavior across the value range and the subsequent value resolution at any given level.

components.name: LatencyUtils
components.description: LatencyUtils is a package that provides latency recording and reporting utilities.

components.name: spring-boot-starter-actuator
components.description: Starter for using Spring Boot's Actuator which provides production ready features to help you monitor and manage your application

components.name: spring-boot-starter-json
components.description: Starter for reading and writing json

components.name: spring-boot-starter-logging
components.description: Starter for logging using Logback. Default logging starter

components.name: spring-boot-starter-tomcat
components.description: Starter for using Tomcat as the embedded servlet container. Default servlet container starter used by spring-boot-starter-web

components.name: spring-boot-starter-web
components.description: Starter for building web, including RESTful, applications using Spring MVC. Uses Tomcat as the default embedded container

components.name: spring-boot-starter
components.description: Core starter, including auto-configuration support, logging and YAML

components.name: snakeyaml
components.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java
